ddls:
CREATE TABLE "incident_types" (
  "incident_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incident type */,
  "incident_name" TEXT /* Name of the incident type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the incident type */,
  "incident_category" TEXT /* Category of the incident (e.g., unintentional, intentional) */,
  "severity_levels" TEXT /* Severity levels associated with the incident (e.g., minor, moderate, severe) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year" TEXT /* The year for which incident data is available */,
  "quarter" TEXT /* Quarter of the year (e.g., Q1, Q2, Q3, Q4) */,
  "month" TEXT /* Month of the year (e.g., January, February, March) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_data" (
  "incident_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incident data entry */,
  "incident_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of incident */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the year */,
  "incident_count" INTEGER /* Number of incidents reported */,
  "male_incident_count" INTEGER /* Number of incidents involving males */,
  "female_incident_count" INTEGER /* Number of incidents involving females */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of individuals involved in the incidents (e.g., 0-17, 18-34, 35-55, 56+) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the incidents occurred (e.g., urban, rural, highway) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_data_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES incident_years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_data_incident_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_type_id") REFERENCES incident_types ("incident_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_causes" (
  "incident_cause_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incident cause */,
  "incident_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of incident */,
  "cause_name" TEXT /* Name of the cause */,
  "cause_description" TEXT /* Description of the cause */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_cause_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_causes_incident_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_type_id") REFERENCES incident_types ("incident_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "location_type" TEXT /* Type of location (e.g., urban, rural, highway) */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, researcher, healthcare provider) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission associated with the role (e.g., view data, edit data, delete data) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-role assignment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_interventions" (
  "intervention_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each intervention */,
  "incident_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of incident */,
  "intervention_name" TEXT /* Name of the intervention */,
  "intervention_description" TEXT /* Description of the intervention */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("intervention_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_interventions_incident_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_type_id") REFERENCES incident_types ("incident_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_risk_factors" (
  "risk_factor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each risk factor */,
  "incident_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of incident */,
  "risk_factor_name" TEXT /* Name of the risk factor */,
  "risk_factor_description" TEXT /* Description of the risk factor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("risk_factor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_risk_factors_incident_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_type_id") REFERENCES incident_types ("incident_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend */,
  "incident_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of incident */,
  "trend_name" TEXT /* Name of the trend */,
  "trend_description" TEXT /* Description of the trend */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_trends_incident_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_type_id") REFERENCES incident_types ("incident_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident.patterns" (
  "pattern_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pattern */,
  "incident_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of incident */,
  "pattern_name" TEXT /* Name of the pattern */,
  "pattern_description" TEXT /* Description of the pattern */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pattern_id")
)
